criminal_summary.case_numbers_xls: FIR No.RC.08(A)/2018 CBI AC – III, New DELHI, CC.No: 16/2024, HON'BLE SPECIAL COURT NO:01 FOR TRIAL OF CASES RELATED TO MP AND MLA, SINGARAVELLAN MALIGAI, CHENNAI. Sections: 120(B), 420,468,471 of IPC and 7,11,12,13(2) R/W 13(1)(D) PC ACT 1988. Brief: Accused of supporting private companies and assisting government officials. This case was registered due to political conspiracy. Charges have not yet been filed. The case is pending in court.

ipc_charges: 1 charges related to Cheating and dishonestly inducing delivery of property (IPC Section-420)
1 charges related to Forgery for purpose of cheating (IPC Section-468)
1 charges related to Punishment of criminal conspiracy (IPC Section-120B)
1 charges related to Using as genuine a forged document or electronic record (IPC Section-471)

discrepancies.title: Net Worth vs Income Reconciliation Failure
discrepancies.description: Calculated Net Worth is ₹61,642,730, but 5-year family income is only ₹13,424,177. Unexplained wealth discrepancy of ₹48,218,553.

discrepancies.title: Suspicious Property Overvaluation
discrepancies.description: Spouse Commercial Buildings purchased in 2016 for ₹1,500,000 (CII Indexed Cost: ₹2,136,364) is declared at highly inflated value of ₹7,000,000.

discrepancies.description: 826.0g gold declared at ₹1,700,000 (Implied rate: ₹2,058/g vs April 2026 Market Rate of ~₹14,200/g).
